_note: PROVISIONAL patterns (plan §8). Verify the exact substrings against real Client.txt fixtures and adjust here — no code change needed. Regexes use named groups; only the distinctive substring is matched, so the timestamp/log-tag prefix is ignored. 'chat' matches chat/whisper/party/guild/trade lines by their channel sigil after the ']' tag; the tracker drops those lines BEFORE parsing (privacy §11.1 + prevents a whisper from spoofing a level-up or zone).
